payload.answer: Do not store this as durable memory.
payload.reason: An entire 8000 word transcript stored as a single conversation_summary is not an appropriate durable memory. It is overly broad, likely contains transient/contextual details, and has not been distilled into stable, user-relevant facts or preferences.
